## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / layer
- [ ] Refactoring (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Dependency update

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for all changed behavior
- [ ] `mvn test -pl sentinel-core` passes locally
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.onnx` model files committed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] New public APIs have a one-line Javadoc (why, not what)
- [ ] For new injection patterns: both a match case and a non-match case are tested
